Creating a Crushing Offer
Module 6
You don’t have to do all this… just go
through and pick and choose what will
work best for you…
Teleseminars or webinars…
• Are a key part of Seed Launches
• You definitely want to survey after each one
• You could do it as video instead of live and
release a video each week
• … but doing a live, interactive webinar has a
higher perceived value
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 5 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Guest Experts
• You could line up a series of experts and
interview them
• These could be live or recorded
• Live is going to have a higher perceived value
Hot Seats
• Basically, someone turns in or shares their work
• You go through and give them suggestions
• e.g. if you teach how to write a resume
• People send you their resume
• You go through it and make tweaks and
show them what to do differently
Audio and Video Recordings
• Provide video and audio file downloads as a
bonus
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 5 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
Case Studies
• Show what someone did, the results they got,
and people can learn from that
Q&A Calls
• A call that’s purely to answer people’s questions
1 on 1 Consulting Calls
• Add a 30-minute or 20-minute, or 60-minute call
with you
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 5 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
Recordings of the calls
• You really should provide this to your Seed
Launch clients
Transcripts
• Take the recordings and get them transcribed
(rev.com)
• Unedited, or edited to clean them up/proof them
A Live Workshop
• You could do your Seed Launch as a live
workshop
• Maybe it’s 5 or 6 people, 10-30 is ideal (more
than that and you lose interaction)
• This is a way to go real high value
• You’d want a bigger list and would be going for a
higher price
• Film it (or at least capture audio recordings)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 5 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	5
A Live Workshop – an Example
• My Product Launch Manager Program
• 50 primary attendees - allowed them to bring a
business partner
• Charged $25,000
• Had a list of tens of thousands of people
• We had 60 or 70 folks attend
• 5-day workshop, went on to turn it into a home
study course
• Went on make millions with the home study
course at $10,000
Pricing for your offer
• It really depends on your market
• Higher prices build value for future products
• e.g. Product Launch Manager was an initial
price of $25,000
• This established the value and allowed me to
sell it for $10,000
• Higher prices means higher compliance – it
motivates them to show up and do the work and
get the results
Pricing for your offer
• Important though – you want to fill the class and
get that critical mass – you want 30 -60 people
• If you have to price it lower to get people to
sign up so you can have it more interactive,
then go with the lower pricing
• In my first Product Launch Workshop, I set it at a
high price, but then I comped some people in
to fill the class
• You could do it for free (but I don’t recommend
it) – fewer people will show up, do the work, get
results when it’s free
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
